CustomField.description: The type of final determination this payload represents. ROD: Record of Decision (EIS culmination). FONSI: Finding of No Significant Impact (EA culmination). CE_Determination: Categorical Exclusion determination memo. Other: Programmatic or special-case determination.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: ROD, FONSI, CE Determination, or Other.
CustomField.label: Decision Type

value.label: Record of Decision (ROD)
value.description: Final agency decision issued at conclusion of an EIS. Required content: selected alternative, mitigation commitments, monitoring requirements.

value.label: Finding of No Significant Impact (FONSI)
value.description: Agency determination that an EA-analyzed action will not significantly affect the quality of the human environment, precluding need for EIS.

value.label: CE Determination
value.description: Documented finding that an action qualifies for a categorical exclusion and no extraordinary circumstances apply.

value.label: Mitigated FONSI
value.description: FONSI conditioned on specific mitigation measures that reduce impacts below significance thresholds.

value.label: Other
value.description: Programmatic determination, supplemental ROD, or other non-standard decision type.
